description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to package mc_rtc that triggers on repository dispatches of types package-master and package-release, on pull requests to any branch, and on push events to any branch with certain paths ignored, as well as push events to tags matching v*. Use a reusable workflow from jrl-umi3218/github-actions to package the project with specified dependencies, ROS integration, and CMake settings. The workflow should also use secrets for Cloudsmith and GitHub Pages tokens.
